channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Haaland Wins Democratic Primary; Hull Leads GOP in New Mexico Governor Race
item.description: Former Interior Secretary Deb Haaland secured the Democratic nomination for New Mexico governor, according to Newsmax projections.

item.title: Alme Wins Montana GOP Senate Primary by a Wide Margin
item.description: Kurt Alme won Montana's Republican Senate primary on Tuesday, backed by endorsements from President Donald Trump and Senator Steve Daines, who vacated the seat.

item.title: Jill Biden Expresses Regret Over Not Discussing Son Hunter's Addiction More
item.description: Jill Biden said she regrets not speaking more about her son Hunter's drug addiction during her time in the White House, noting she now realizes the importance of openness.

item.title: Supreme Court allows Alabama GOP-backed congressional map for midterms
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled that Alabama may use a 2023 congressional map featuring one majority-Black district, a win for Republicans ahead of the midterm elections.
